prestazioni: Forced induction upgrade via HKS GT-SS Supercharger kit (S06A-5) designed specifically for the S07A turbocharged 0.66L 3-cylinder engine, producing 12 psi of boost and pushing power to 110 hp (82 kW) at 6,500 RPM with a custom HKS ECU reflash (part #15204-AK002) to optimize fueling and ignition timing for the N-Box Joy’s CVT transmission

Full titanium exhaust system by Fujitsubo (part #172-0010) featuring 38mm primary tubes, 50mm secondary tubes, and a 100mm rear muffler with integrated 304 stainless steel resonator, reducing weight by 4.2 kg while maintaining JDM compliance for urban driving

KW Variant 3 coilover suspension (part #35231001) with 40mm front and 35mm rear adjustable damping, custom-valved for the N-Box Joy’s 2,450mm wheelbase and 1,475mm track width, paired with Eibach Pro-Kit springs (part #2094.120) for a 25mm drop and reinforced subframe bushings by Whiteline (part #KDT946)
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (part #LB-HNBOXJ-01) with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a ducktail spoiler, extending the N-Box Joy’s width by 60mm and requiring custom fender flares for JDM-spec 15x7 ET35 Volk Racing TE37SL wheels (part #TE37SL-15735HN) in Hyper Silver

Full custom interior retrim by Status Racing (part #ST-HNBOXJ-INT) featuring Recaro SR-7F seats (part #391) with custom N-Box Joy mounting brackets, Alcantara door cards with red stitching, and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (part #0111200113) with a NRG quick-release hub (part #NRG-400-OSK)

Aerodynamic front bumper lip by Varis Japan (part #VN-HNBOXJ-FLIP) in dry carbon fiber, paired with a custom rear diffuser by Seibon Carbon (part #CF-HNBOXJ-DIFF) and a HKS Hipermax RS coilover-specific front strut bar (part #55010-AK001) to reduce chassis flex by 18%
